meaning: n.[植] 西阿拉黄檀树(产于南美洲),西阿拉黄檀木
examples: A CNY Celebration Dinner was held at Kingwood Hotel, Sibu, on 13 January 2006, organized by Grace Construction Enterprise.
In Kingwood, Texas, software developer Egberto Willies spoke with 34-year-old veteran Paul Rodriguez.
Prosecutors said 34-year-old Platero, of Kingwood, Texas, opened fire on his roommates as they readied for bed at Camp Fallujah on Sept. 23, 2010.
